name: report-widgets
title: Report Widgets
description: Create and manage Sytex report widgets (charts, tables, KPIs) via the API.
setup_instructions: You need: (1) the instance URL, (2) your organization ID, and (3) either a Token or an API key (client_id + client_secret from Settings > API Keys in Sytex).

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Instance URL
fields.help: The base URL of your Sytex instance.

fields.name: token
fields.label: API Token
fields.help: DRF Token for auth. Use this OR the API key fields below.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.help: API key Client ID (from Settings > API Keys in Sytex).
